title: Allow choice of number format
excerpt: It would be great to be able to assign a format to numbers (eg : no decimals, figures with block separations XXX XXX. When we have a number in a dashboard, it looks like 123243253,65 which is hard to read (much easier 12…

posts.author: MediReport (Eric Eisenberg)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to be able to assign a format to numbers (eg : no decimals, figures with block separations XXX XXX. When we have a number in a dashboard, it looks like 123243253,65 which is hard to read (much easier 123 243 253)

posts.author: gext (Iker Rivera)
posts.cookedHtml: Why there’s no follow up to posts regarding number separators ???

posts.author: JussiN (Jussi Niittyviita)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be a great enhancement in the dashboards!

posts.author: mroden (Mark Roden)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any update on this why do we need , for numbers especially if its used as a ref number

posts.author: delia (Délia Figueira)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, in our company, we also need to format the number column, as it is possible to do it in Excel for example.

Our needs :

  • Number with two digits maximum
  • Format a Year without a separator displayed.
  • Any personnalised format like in Excel.

This feature request is also related to this one : Add More Date Format Options

Generally, the formatting of columns is not flexible enough

posts.author: Marc_Furberg (Marc Furberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
In boards, it would be great to disable the summarized line sometimes !

In your example, if numbers represent year, the summarize means nothing !
